steps.title: Use the table to rank
steps.content: The student says tribal economic activity contributed over \$141,000 per employee. To rank it among the four industries (transportation/warehousing, manufacturing, health care, plus tribal), we need to see which industries' per-employee contributions are above and below \$141,000.

steps.title: Match the comparison
steps.content:
Per the table, transportation/warehousing's per-employee contribution exceeds tribal's, while manufacturing and health care fall below it. So tribal activity ranks below transportation/warehousing but above both manufacturing and health care.

A and D over- or understate the ranking. C misdescribes the relation to transportation/warehousing.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
